purpose: Canonical Shopify product metafield definitions used by the MMG Knowledge Library, subscription picker, Customer Portal, and Kairos asset registry.

definitions.name: Subscription Eligible
definitions.description: Whether an active digital download may enter subscriber selection after all remaining gates pass.

definitions.name: Asset Status
definitions.description: Lifecycle state for the canonical digital asset.

definitions.name: Asset ID
definitions.description: Permanent Kairos asset identifier. Stable even when the Shopify handle changes.

definitions.name: Primary Topic
definitions.description: Primary subject classification used for discovery and recommendations.

definitions.name: Digital Format
definitions.description: Commercial format of the digital asset.

definitions.name: Series Order
definitions.description: Optional one-based order within a series.

definitions.name: Related Asset IDs
definitions.description: Canonical related mmg.asset_id values for continuation and recommendations.

definitions.name: Square Thumbnail
definitions.description: Required 2048 by 2048 square image used by subscription selection, portals, and square modules.

definitions.name: Subscription Value
definitions.description: Number of entitlement units consumed when the asset is selected.

definitions.name: Delivery Package Reference
definitions.description: Opaque Kairos delivery-package reference. Must resolve to a verified customer-ready package before subscriber selection.

definitions.name: Customer Destination
definitions.description: Primary authenticated destination for the purchased or delivered item.

provisioning_rules: Create or reconcile definitions by namespace, key, owner type, and compatible type.
Do not change the type of a populated production metafield without an explicit migration.
Do not set subscription_eligible true for services or the subscription product.
Do not set asset_status active until the customer package and required media are ready.
Do not reuse an asset_id across different commercial assets.
A product is not subscriber-selectable until every required subscription-selection field is present and Kairos revalidation passes.
